title: glaucium leiocarpum
intro: Glaucium leiocarpum, also known as the lesser hornpoppy, is a perennial plant species in the poppy family, Papaveraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. Glaucium leiocarpum is said to have various health benefits, such as relieving coughs and colds, reducing fever, and easing respiratory issues. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it is typically combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
